metadata.description: Drug-drug interactions database for clinical decision support

interactions.description: Concurrent use increases risk of nephrotoxicity
interactions.clinical_significance: Avoid concurrent use when possible. If used together, monitor renal function closely.
management: Adjust doses based on renal function

interactions.clinical_significance: Monitor hearing function when used concurrently
management: Monitor for tinnitus or hearing changes

interactions.clinical_significance: Major bleeding risk. Avoid concurrent use unless specifically indicated.

interactions.description: Amiodarone inhibits warfarin metabolism, increasing anticoagulation
management: Adjust dose based on INR response

interactions.description: Regular acetaminophen use may enhance warfarin effect
interactions.clinical_significance: Monitor INR when starting regular acetaminophen
management: Limit acetaminophen to <2g daily when possible

interactions.description: Regular acetaminophen use may enhance warfarin effect
interactions.clinical_significance: Monitor INR when using regular acetaminophen with warfarin

MAJOR.description: Life-threatening or requires immediate medical intervention
MAJOR.action: Avoid combination or use with extreme caution

MODERATE.description: May cause deterioration in patient condition

interaction_types.PHARMACOKINETIC: Affects absorption, distribution, metabolism, or elimination
interaction_types.PHARMACODYNAMIC: Affects drug action at receptor or target site
